visual_description: A medium shot shows a man in a pink and white plaid shirt leaning forward with a concerned expression, looking at someone off-screen to the right. The background is a softly lit room with a framed picture on the wall and a wall sconce. White text with a black outline appears on the screen, reading, "CO-EXECUTIVE PRODUCER" on the top line and "TODD STEVENS" on the bottom. The text on the screen changes. The new text reads, "EXECUTIVE PRODUCER" on the top line and "SCOTT SILVERI" on the bottom. The man in the pink shirt continues to speak, gesturing with his hands while holding a small, white object. The man he is speaking to, seen from the back, is wearing a blue and white plaid shirt. The first man speaks in a slightly defensive and explanatory tone, as if trying to justify a situation. "Why not? It's it's built into the price of the room." His voice is steady but carries a hint of exasperation.
